title: Yao Yun
content:
Yao Yun
 is a second-generation member of the 
Yao Family
. He has been possessed by a demon-ling.

History
[
]

In the past, his elder brother, 
Blood Ancestor
's father, escaped the 
Allheaven Star System
 for the 
Alliance Star System
. At the time he was not able to understand the reason behind his brother's actions but afterwards when his father, 
Blood God
, devoured his elder sister and further refined his niece, 
Yao Mengyun
, into the 
ancient lamp
's spirit, he understood it all.

Afterwards, Blood God poured a demon-ling inside Yao Yun to control him after he tried to rebel and save his two nieces, Yao Mengyun and 
Yao Bingyun
.
